introSection: Sand Storm is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Diego Cavazza currently owned and travelled by US carnival operator Frazier Shows.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was previously located at Joyland Amusement Park in Lubbock, Texas, USA. It replaced the Mad Mouse.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and unpainted supports. It had this same color scheme at Coney Beach Pleasure Park, but had red track at Śląskie Wesołe Miasteczko

fullText:
Sand Storm is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Diego Cavazza currently owned and travelled by US carnival operator Frazier Shows.

The ride was previously located at Joyland Amusement Park in Lubbock, Texas, USA. It replaced the Mad Mouse.



Yellow track and unpainted supports. It had this same color scheme at Coney Beach Pleasure Park, but had red track at Śląskie Wesołe Miasteczko
